title: Second headset connected with the mobile app
scenario: Verify second headset connected to Poly Studio Mobile app appears correctly on Inventory, Device User, Mobile Profile, and Device Profile pages with accurate data when first headset is already registered on Lens tenant
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure the first headset is already connected and registered on the Lens tenant.
3. Navigate to the Device Settings screen for the first headset and confirm it appears in the app.
4. Power on a second headset and put it into pairing mode (press and hold the Bluetooth button).
5. On the Home screen, tap the '+' or 'Add Device' button to initiate pairing.
6. Select the second headset from the list of available devices to connect it to the app.
7. Once connected, navigate to the Inventory page (Account → Inventory).
8. Verify the second headset appears on the Inventory page with accurate data: name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
9. Navigate to the Device User / Mobile User page (Account → Device User / Mobile User).
10. Verify the second headset appears with accurate data: name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
11. Navigate to the Mobile Profile page (Account → Mobile Profile).
12. Verify the second headset appears with accurate data: name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
13. Navigate to the Device Profile page (Account → Device Profile).
14. Verify the second headset appears with accurate data: name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
expected: The second headset appears correctly on the Inventory page, Device User/Mobile User page, Mobile Profile page, and Device Profile page with accurate data including name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
